understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, using the limited turns/attempts efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after a horizontal move the character automatically travels in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK can interact with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable `x` blocks to open a fall path—and requires a target [x,y]; clicks do not consume moving-platform time when present. Landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning relies on the state’s landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to pick moves that create safe passages (often indicated by a big y-change) toward the goal.
